description: The bird resembled a grey cardinal with a red belly, yellow beak, prominent crest, and long tail. First observed with a number of house finches and black-capped chickadees perched on the fence next to the bird feeder during a snow storm. After a moment on the fence, the bird made use of the feeder and then flew off. The door was closed, so no calls were observed.
photographer: Photographer: Taylor Smith, Taylor Smith, Taylor Smith, Taylor Smith
